title: Update Cheng profile: Remove logo, add WhatsApp booking with number 9119960204

requirements.text: Remove the logo image from the header at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/img[1]
acceptanceCriteria: The logo image element in the site header is removed
The header layout adjusts gracefully without the logo

requirements.text: Add WhatsApp booking functionality with phone number +91 9119960204 to the selected elements, replacing or enhancing existing contact/booking information
acceptanceCriteria: WhatsApp booking button or link is added with phone number +91 9119960204
Clicking the WhatsApp element opens WhatsApp with pre-filled message to the specified number
The WhatsApp integration is clearly visible and accessible to users

requirements.text: Update the contact phone number in the selected elements (XPaths for sections 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7) to display +91 9119960204 for WhatsApp booking
acceptanceCriteria: All selected contact/booking elements display the new WhatsApp number +91 9119960204
The number is formatted consistently across all locations
The number is linked to open WhatsApp when clicked

constraints: Only modify the 7 elements identified by the provided XPath expressions
Do not change other parts of the application outside the selected elements
Preserve existing functionality in non-selected elements
nonGoals: Creating an admin booking management system
Changing the overall site design or color scheme
